name: Sea Stealth II
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>潜海奇襲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シー・ステルス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ⅱ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ツー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card's name becomes "Umi" while on the field or in the GY. Your opponent cannot target WATER monsters you control with non-WATER monster effects. At the start of the Battle Phase: You can Special Summon from your hand or GY, 1 monster that mentions "Umi", or 1 WATER Normal Monster, in Defense Position, but destroy it at the end of the Battle Phase. You can only use this effect of "Sea Stealth II" once per turn.
eff: This card's name becomes "Umi" while on the field or in the GY. Your opponent cannot target WATER monsters you control with non-WATER monster effects. At the start of the Battle Phase: You can Special Summon from your hand or GY, 1 monster that mentions "Umi", or 1 WATER Normal Monster, in Defense Position, but destroy it at the end of the Battle Phase. You can only use this effect of "Sea Stealth II" once per turn.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Duels From the Deep

jp_sets.set: Duelist Pack: Duelists of the Abyss

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
Changes own name while in the GY
mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
misc: At the start of the Battle Phase
